zh.lifeSummary: 當Julianna de Southworth於1449年出生在英國藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯時，她的父親Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury39歲，母親Elizabeth Molyneux25歲。她於1472年9月24日與Sir Richard Towneley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julianna de Southworth于1449年出生在英国藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury39岁，母亲Elizabeth Molyneux25岁。她于1472年9月24日与Sir Richard Towneley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Southworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Southworth in Winwick (Lancashire), from Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Suthard
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Southwood
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places in southern England, especially in Devon, named with Middle English bi southe wode ‘(place) to the south of the wood’.

habitational name from one or more minor places called Southwood or Sowood, from Middle English south(e) + wode ‘south wood’. Sowood in Osset (Yorkshire) is the most likely source of the Yorkshire name. There may have been confusion with Southworth .

variants.name: Sudduth
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Julianna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anna  , perhaps sometimes intended as a form of   Juliana .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Julianna de Southworth was born in 1449, in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Molyneux, was 25. She married Sir Richard Towneley on 24 September 1472, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1485, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julianna de Southworth est née en 1449, à Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Molyneux, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Towneley le 24 septembre 1472, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julianna de Southworth 1449 in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Molyneux 25. Sie hat am 24. September 1472 in England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Towneley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Towneley il 24 settembre 1472, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ko.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일 스트 리나르드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Julianna de Southworth(이)가 1449년 영국 랭카실르 크로프트 위스 소우스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Molyneux(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1472년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Richard Towneley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julianna de Southworth nasceu em 1449, em Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Molyneux, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Towneley em 24 de setembro de 1472, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julianna de Southworth родилась в 1449 г. в местности крофт вит соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Molyneux, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Towneley 24 сентября 1472 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

Se casó con Sir Richard Towneley el 24 de septiembre de 1472, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
